sources/billing-policy-2026.md.claim: Invoices for new contracts are due in 14 days.

sources/pricing-public.md.claim: Pro is priced per seat per month on the public page.

sources/pricing-sales.md.claim: Contracted Pro accounts use annual-only pricing in the sales memo.
